headline: A Look At Home Depot’s (HD) Valuation As Shares Weaken Ahead Earnings And Legal And Housing Headwinds
summary: Home Depot (HD) heads into its first quarter earnings under pressure, with the stock recently weaker and sentiment cautious as housing turnover, high mortgage rates, and acquisition related margin strains weigh on expectations. See our latest analysis for Home Depot. The recent slide has been steady rather than sudden, with the share price down 12.22% over 30 days and 23.92% over 90 days, while the 1 year total shareholder return is down 19.89% but the 3 year total shareholder return is...
